article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. 2026 - 2030 Financial Plan and Burnaby Financial Plan Bylaw 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on Burnaby's 2026–2030 Financial Plan, including a 2.9% property tax increase
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on a five-year financial plan and a supporting bylaw that would raise property taxes by 2.9%, keep water rates flat, and increase sewer rates by 3.5% for 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review the proposed rate increases at burnaby.ca — budget for higher property tax and sewer costs in 2026.
